questions.question: Compare and contrast the scalability of RDBMS and Hadoop. Provide reasons to support your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the key aspects of scalability in both systems.

questions.question: Explain the significance of MapReduce in Hadoop. How does it contribute to the processing and analysis of big data?
questions.hint: Emphasize the importance of MapReduce in big data processing.

questions.question: Describe the difference between Hadoop's distributed file system (HDFS) and RDBMS's storage management system. Which one is better suited for handling large datasets?
questions.hint: Highlight the key characteristics of each storage system and their respective strengths.
